## Checklist

- [ ] Updated `docs/` if user-visible behaviour changed
- [ ] Added/updated tests where it makes sense
- [ ] Conventional commit prefix in title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`)
- [ ] No secrets committed
